subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and we're genuinely excited about the potential synergy between our teams.

We'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these works best for you and we'll get a calendar invite out right away.

Regarding your request for internal contact details (CTO, VP of Engineering, etc.) — I'm not able to share our internal directory or direct contact information. If it would be helpful to involve additional stakeholders on our side, we're happy to facilitate introductions through the proper channels once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
